questionHtml:
Which processes require calcium?

I. Muscle contraction
II. Movement of an action potential along an axon
III. Production of the skeleton of hard corals

A. I and II only

B. I and III only

C. II and III only

D. I, II and III

meta.title: Which processes require calcium? I. Muscle contractionII. Movement of an action potential along an axonIII. Production of the skeleton of hard corals A. I and II only B. I and III
